steps_completed.task: Add backend endpoint GET /v1/markets/{id}/cpt in server.py that reads CONDITIONAL_MARGINALS[marketId] and returns all context->outcome->probability entries as JSON, including outcome labels and parent variable names.
Add frontend API client function getMarketCpt(marketId) in client.ts and corresponding TypeScript types (CptEntry, CptParent, CptResponse) in types.ts.
Create useCpt hook that fetches CPT data via getMarketCpt with react-query caching and auto-refresh.
Create CptPanel React component that renders the CPT as an HTML table with parent configurations as rows and outcomes as columns, using existing panelStyle. Handles single-row (no parents) case.

Add inline editing to CptPanel cells: clicking a probability cell activates a slider/input, submits via useProbabilityEdit with the appropriate context array, and refreshes the table to show backend-normalized values.
Integrate CptPanel into MarketDetail.tsx as a sibling panel in the CSS grid layout, positioned after AssumptionPanel and before EventTradePanel.
